index.title: Atuqtakhanik Numiktiriji
index.description: Resource Translator angmaqhiyuq qaritauyakkut-numiktiqhimayunik pull requests ikayuutikkut tutquumavingnun quyaginaq tutquumavingnun, quyaginaq ihuaqhaidjutinun — aulapkaqtauyuq hapkunanga Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, uvaluuniin Google Cloud Translation.
index.socialTitle: Atuqtakhanut Numiktiriyi — numiktirlugit atuqtakhat tutquumaviit inminik
index.badge: v3.0 — Azure, AWS & Google providers, Node 24, repo config
index.lede: Resource Translator angmaqhivaktuq qaritauyakkut-numiktiqhimayunik pull requests atuqtakharnut tutquumavingnut atuqhugu Azure, AWS, unaluuniit Google — atauhiq atayuq qanuriliurutikhaq, atauhiq tuniuqhaiyi atauhiqmut pidjutaanut, ilitariyauhimayut SDKs ataani.
index.workflowBody: Iliuraqlugu qanuriliurutikhaq tadja CI-mut, tikkuarlugu Azure-mut, AWS-mut, Google-mulluuniit, taimaa repo uqariami tamainnik uqauhirnik tikinnahuaqtarnik.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Iliuraqlugu {configPath} tutquumavik ilaliutilugit globs, naunaitkutit, unalu Custom Translator katitirviit.

glossary.title: Tukiliurutit-ilihimaniq
glossary.body: Kiluuttarlugit qanuritmangaangit atingit hunavaluitlu taidjutikhangit ayuittiagiikhimayunik tainiinik kiklivikhaqaqtunik regex taima munagiyaangat {cpp}, {dotnet}, ilannagiyaingitlu.

dryRun.title: Dry-run + soft-fail
dryRun.body: Naunaiyaqlugit numiktiqhimayut titiraqhimaitumik titiqanik, uvaluuniin nuitiqlugit tamaita ihuiguhuutit qayagidjutigilugit uuktuqtilutit.

sdk.title: Azure, AWS unalu Google
sdk.body: Atauhiqmik pilutit atauhiqmik aqpayumut. Tamarmik aulapkaqtitauyut ilitariyauhimayumit SDK ({azureSdk}, {awsSdk}, {googleSdk}) inminik uuktuffaaqhutik {statusCodes} — algakkut aulapkaqtaulimaittuq HTTP. {esbuild}-atauttimungaqhimajut, ihivriuqhinikkut-halumajuq.

workflowPreview.body: Pingahut aallanut uqaqtailiniit, hitamat nalruyut, tutquumavigiyat amihunik uqauhiqaqtuq tuklianik piyumaliruvit.

cta.title: Upalunggaiqqit in'ngilrayaami inmigut auladjunmik?
cta.body: Attauhiq tunihiyuq kiluutaq — Azure, AWS, uvaluuniin Google — uvalu attauhiq havauhikkut tutquumavik. Atuqtakhanik Numiktiriyi munarivagait ilangit.

getting-started.title: Aullaqtiutikhanut
getting-started.lede: Ilaliutilugu workflow tutquumavik, tikkuarlugu Azure AI Translator naunaitkutainut, qanuriliurutikhaq aadjiliurniaqtaa tutquumavik pivikhanik uqauhikkut atuqtakhanik tutquumaviit imaalu tujurlugit numiktitiqhimajut.

provision.title: Pivikhaqaqtittilutik Azure AI Numiktiriyimut ikayuutiqhamik
provision.body: Piliurlutit Azure AI Translator atuqtakhanik Azure portal-mi, ahiit tutqurlugit hapkuat imaatut GitHub repository aallanut uqaqtailiniit workflow taigurianginni:

resource.title: Commit a source resource file
resource.body: Ikayuutikkut tutquumaviit atuqhugit {namingConvention} katimaqyuagutit. Una uuktuutigillaklugu {sourceFile} {frFile}, {deFile}, taimaatullu aqpahuirumi.

output.title: Ihivriuqlugu piliurninnga
output.body: Havauhiq iniqqat, hulidjut tautuktitiyuq pingahunik outputnik iliugaqtaaqtatit PRmun naunaiyautainun: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, uvalu {hasNewTranslations}. Titiraqhunilu Markdown naittumik havaap makpirvianun {coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Tukliit Havaktauniaqtun
nextSteps.recipes: Takulugit igadjutikhat monorepos-mut, custom glossaries, unalu Custom Translator katitirviit.

providers.title: Numiktirijit
providers.lede: Pilutit atauhirmik numiktirijikhamik atauhirmut — Azure AI Translator, AWS Translate, imaaluuniit Google Cloud Translation — tunuani atauhirmik, atajumik API qaangani. Numiktiriyi idjuhiqaqtuq aadjikiiktumik tunihigaluaqtiluni; taapkuanginnait ilitaridjutingit aallangajut.
providers.backwardCompatible: Tamaat kingumut ihuaqtuq: {provider} {azure}, taimaali atuqtauyut Azure workflows havakhimmaaqtut aalanguqhimaitumik — ihuaqhariaqangitut.

selecting.title: Tikuaqhiniq munaqhiyukhamik
selecting.body: Ihuaqharlugu {provider} iliuraidjutaa {azure} (default), {aws}, imaaluuniit {google}, ahiit tunihilutit tunihijup naunaitkutainnik. Atauhiinnaq tuniqhaiyuq atuqtauyuq atauhiqmut qanuriliurutikhamut hivayaqtauyuq; tamna hanaqidjutikhaq naunairutiqaqhimayuq talvuuna aadjikiiktumik SDKnik tunuani havagvikyuangani.

aws.name: AWS Translate
aws.credentials: OIDC / default chain, unaluuniit awsAccessKeyId + awsSecretAccessKey; awsRegion

azure.title: Azure AI Translator (default)
azure.body: Atuqtauluangituq tunihiyuq. Tunilugu Azure AI Translator ikayuutikhaq tunilugulu {subscriptionKey}, {endpoint}, unalu piumagumi {region}. Una aadjikkutaa ihuaqhaqtauhimajuq tadja atuqtaujut havaakhat tadja atuqtaujut.

aws.title: AWS Translate
aws.body: Atuqtuq {sdk}. Pilluarumagungni OIDC {configureAwsCredentials} taimaa akuniraaluk aallanut uqaqtailiniit tutquumangittanginni — qanuriliurutinga taiguqtaa AWS SDK default credential chain. Ahiagullu, {awsAccessKeyId} {awsSecretAccessKey} naunaittiaqhimayumik. Aviktuqhimaniq ihariagiyaunginnaqtuq, ukunuuna {awsRegion} unaluuniit {awsRegionEnv} avatinga aadlatqiiktuq.
aws.keysNote: Aturiami statique kiluuttat unaungittumik OIDC, piirlugu {configureAwsCredentials} talvannga piyakhaq tunilugulu {awsAccessKeyId} / {awsSecretAccessKey} (via {secrets}) unalu {awsRegion}.

google.title: Google Cloud Numiktiriniq
google.body: Atuqtuq {sdk} (v2). Tutqighaqlugit imaa API key ({googleApiKey}) uvaluuniin kivgaqtuutikkut-account JSON naunaitkutaa ({googleCredentials}). Tunihilutit atauhiinnarmik; Piumagumik {googleProjectId} naunaiqtauyuq naunaitkutanganit piiqtaugumi.

mapping.title: Intent-specifier nunauyiurniq
mapping.body: Tuniqhaiyumut-ihuaqtumut naunaiyaininnga iliuraqtauyut talvani aadjikutariyaanik ittuq. Hunavaluit aadlat utiffaaqpaktut ihuaqtumut taimaa pitquhinga aadjikutariyaa.
mapping.caption: Intent-specifier nunauyaliurniq tamainni tuniuqhaiyini

locales.title: Nunami naunaitkutait aallangajut atauhirmun tuniuqhaijimun
locales.body: Tamarmik tuniqhaiyut atuqtut nanminiriyamiknik nunannga naunaitkutangit (una uuktuutigillaklugu Simplified Chinese is {azureCode} Azure-mi, {awsCode} AWS-mi, unalu {googleCode} Google-mi). Naunaitkutit qaangiqpaktut taimaitumik aulapkaqhugillu tutquumaviit atiit, pilugit {toLocales} piyumayat ikayuqtait.

configuration.title: Ihuaqhaininnga
configuration.lede: Express defaults atauhiinnarmik iliuraivikhami config tutquumaviani imaalu tamaita havaktaujukhat tunijaupkarlugit. Hulidjutikkut ihumagiyauyut akimayut tamangnik tuniyaugaangamik.
configuration.intro: Qaangirlugu apqutikhaq {configPath} iliuraidjutaa ihariagigungni atuqtaungittumik najugakhamik.

fields.sourceLocale: Utiffaaqtuq {sourceLocale} iliuraqtaungitpat. Hivumuuqtitauyuqlu Numiktiriyimun {fromLocale} naittut naqitautit ilituriyaulimaitut.
fields.toLocales: Kituliqaa array uvaluniit virguunmik avikhimayumik string-mik.
fields.includeExclude: Glob qanurinigit naunaiyaqtauyut tamainit havakviuyunilu pijutiqaqtunik apqutinik.
fields.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — havagvingni/domain knob (maligatigut, munaqhiliqinikkut, niuvaanikkut tone, taimaalu.). Tuyuqtauyuq {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Atuqtauluangituq {plain}. Aturlugu {html} atuqtakhatit piqaqqata HTML fragments-nik.
fields.allowFallback: Ihuaqhaqlugu {false} nakuunggittuq numiktitirniq {categoryId} pidjutinggitpat tikiutiyaami talvainnakmi talvainnakmi.
fields.maxRetries: Anginiqhaq uuktuffaarniq tadjakaffuk HTTP kiudjutit ({statusCodes}). Atuqtauluangituq {defaultRetries}. Attautimun HTTP hivayaqtut attauhirmun {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Matulugu (ms) kituni hiningnairumi. Atuqtauluangituq {defaultBackoff}. Azure's {retryAfter} header nan'ngariyauyuq talvaniitkaangat; taimaali jittered exponential backoff atuqtauyuq, kikliqaqtuq uvani aktilaanganun.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Atuqtauluangituq {true}. Atuqtaugaangamik, tokens imaatun {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} unalu HTML entities himmiqtaublutik sentinel tokensnik nuutiqtautinagit uvalu utiqtitaublutik kinguani. Unguvaqtirlugu pivikhaq pihuqhaaqhimakpat piqaqqat placeholder-mik titirauhirnik.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ilaliutihimayut regex atugahat (kikliqangitut) ilaliutihimayut atuqtauluaqtunun naunaitkutinun katitiqhimayut, imaa {angleToken} haffumunga custom token syntax. Ihuangitut regexes hugiyaungitut.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Glob idjuhiit aadjikkiiktut parser-level keys-nut (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Aadjikkiiktut kiluuttat piiqtauvaktut tukhiunmit talvunggaulutik pivigiyait tammaqtailiplugit.

steps.precedence: Tamainnut aadlanut piyut havakvikmi, iliurainiq akimayuq; taimaali YAML aktilaanga atuqtauyuq.
steps.validation: Katitiqhimayut akiit tutqighaqtauyut. Ihuangitut enums (imaa {invalidEnum}) pidjutauyut hulidjutinun ihuangitumik qilamik naunaitumik tuhaqtidjutmik.

tone.heading: Nipinga havakvingalu, naunaittumik tainiit
tone.body: Una Azure AI Translator v3 API piqangittuq atauhiinnarmik nipaarutimik knob-mik. Malruuk ihuaqhaqhimajuk attautimukhimajut aadjikkiiktunik munaqhidjutikhanik:
tone.industryBody: atuqlugu {categoryId} tikkuariami Azure {customTranslatorLink} ilagiyanganik ayuirhaqhimayuq nanminiriyarnik timiqutigiyarnik — maligatigut, ayurnaqtunik, munarhiliqinikkut, niuvvaaviliqinikkut, hunanikluuniit. Una hakugitqijaujuq pidjutikhaq nipaanun, qanurittunun nipinun, tainiinnunlu.
tone.surfaceBody: Atuqlugu {glossaryLink} kiluuttariami piliuqhimayut atiit hunavaluillu tainiit tainiit, aturlugulu {profanityAction} piiyariami nakuungittumik tainiit pinahualirumi nunamut nukaqhiuyunut.

inputs.title: Iliuraiyut aniyullu
inputs.lede: Tamaita iliuraqtauhimayut piyauhimayut piyakhani repo config tutquumaviani. Tamarmik ihuaqhikpata, qanuriliurutikhaq iliuraidjutaa akimajuq.
inputs.configurationIntro: Takulugu {configurationLink} haffumunga YAML schema uvalu iliurainikkut ihuaqhaidjut.

items.sourceLocale: Tunngavinga locale (ukunatitut {en}) atuqtauyuq paqittigiami ikayuutimut tutquumavingit ukunatitut {sourceGlob}. Hivumuuqtitauyuqlu tuniqhaiyumut {fromLocale}.

providerInputs.heading: Tunihinikkut tikuaqhiniq uvalu ilitagidjutinik
providerInputs.caption: Tuniqhaiyuq tikkuarninnga unalu atauhiqmut-niuvvaaviuyumut naunaitkutangit
providerInputs.intro: Pilugu attauhiq tunihiyuq attauhirmun ulapqiyunun {provider}. Tunihilutit tikuaqtauhimayumik tunihiyup naunaitkutainik — takulugu {providersLink} atugahaq tamainun ihuaqhaidjutinun.

items.provider: Numiktiriji: {azure} (default), {aws}, imaaluuniit {google}. Atauhiinnaq tuniqhaijuq atuqtaujuq atauhiqmut qanuriliurutikhamut hivajautimut.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Ihariagiyauyuq {azure}. Apquhaqlugu {secrets}.
items.endpoint: Azure Translator endpoint URL, e.g. {endpointUrl}. Ihariagiyauyuq {azure}.
items.awsAccessKeyId: AWS access key id. Piumagumik — piirlugu (piqaqtumik {awsSecretAccessKey}) aturiami AWS default credential chain / OIDC. Apquhaqlugu {secrets}.
items.awsSecretAccessKey: AWS iiraqtuqtumik piinarialaqihimayuq kiluutaq. Tuniyauyukhat atautikkut {awsAccessKeyId}. Apquhaqlugu {secrets}.
items.awsSessionToken: Piumagumik AWS session token tadjakaffuk naunaitkutinik. Apquharlugu {secrets}.
items.awsRegion: AWS avikturnianni Numiktitirutikhanut ikajuutikhat (e.g. {regionExample}). Ihariagiyauyuq {aws} kihimi {awsRegionEnv} iliuraqtaukpat avatingani.
items.googleApiKey: Google Cloud API key. Tunilugu una UVALUUNIIN {googleCredentials} {google}. Apquhaqlugu {secrets}.
items.googleCredentials: Google Cloud service-account kiluutaq imaatut JSON string. Tunilugu una UVALUUNIIN {googleApiKey} {google}. Apquhaqlugu {secrets}.
items.googleProjectId: Piyakhaq Google Cloud havaap naunaitkutaa. Naunaiqtauvaktuq taffumanga service-account credential.

items.toLocales: Humi numiktiqtakhat. Naamagiyaa JSON array ({jsonArray}) uvaluuniin virgule-avikhimayut akiit.
items.include: Newline-avikhimayut glob-guyut qanuriniginik; aadjikkiiktut titiqqat numiktiqtauvaktut.
items.exclude: Newline-avikhimayut glob-guyut qanuriniginik; aadjikkiiktut tutquumaviit piiktauyut (iliuraqtaulutik kinguagut include).
items.configPath: Apqutinga uumunnga YAML config tutquumavinga (piyuq uumunnga havakviup tunngavinga).
items.dryRun: Humi {true}, numiktiqlugit uvalu tuyuqlugit naittumik kihimi titiraqhimaitumik titiqanik.
items.failOnError: Humi {true}, niriuktaungitut ihuinaarutit pingitait hulidjutit; Humi {false}, ihuinaarutit qayangnautit.

translatorInputs.heading: Azure Translator tukhiut iliuraqtauhimayut
translatorInputs.intro: Hapkuat iliuraiyut talvunga Azure AI Translator v3 query parameters atuqtauyullu azure provider-mut. textType unalu proclamityAction iliuraqtauyullu uumunnga AWS/Google talvani aadjikutariyaa ittuq (takulugu tuniqhaiyut maliktakhangit); ilangit Azure-nginnait. Tamaita piumagumik; tamna Numiktiriyi defaults atuqtauyuq ihuaqhaqhimangitpat.
translatorInputs.caption: Azure Translator tukhiut iliuraqtauhimayut

items.categoryId: Azure {customTranslatorLink} category — the industry/domain/tone knob. Hivumuuqtitauyuq {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} or {html}. Aturlugu {html} taimaa ikayuutitit piqpiarumik HTML fragments.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, or {deleted}. Munaridjutauyuq qanuq nakuungittumik tainiit tuniyauvaktut numiktiqhimayuni.
items.allowFallback: Humi {false}, Numiktiriyi utiqtitiyuq ihuinaarutimik utiqhimaitumik auladjutinun {categoryId} piqangitpat auladjutinun turaaqhimayumun nayugaanun.

resilienceInputs.heading: Mahulingainiq uvalu nayugahait munaridjutit
resilienceInputs.intro: Hapkuat iliuraidjutit munaridjutaujut qanuqtut qanuriliurutikhat idjuhikhanik tamna Numiktiriyi nutqaqtitpagu tukhiqtarnik imaalu qanuqtut pittailitikhanik placeholder tokens imaittunik {mustache} imaaluuniit {indexZero} ahiruqtaulimaittanginni numiktitirititlugit.
resilienceInputs.caption: Hakugingniit uvalu nayugait munagidjutikkut uqautauyut

items.maxRetries: Anginiqhaq uuktuffaarniq tadjakaffuk HTTP kiudjutit ({statusCodes}). Attautimut qaffiuniit HTTP hivayaqtut attauhirmun {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Matulugu (milliseconds-ni) hinikvikhanut. Hulidjut nan'ngariyaa Azure's {retryAfter} kiudjutaa qulaani talvaniitpat; taimaali atuqtuq jittered exponential backoff kikliqaqtuq uvani aktilaangani.
items.protectPlaceholders: Humi {true} (default), placeholders imaatun {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} unalu HTML entities himmauhiqtauyut sentinel tokensnik numiktiqtautinagit uvalu utiqtitaublutik kinguani. Unguvaqtirlugu pivikhat pihuqhaaqhimakpat piqaqqat titiraqhimajunik numiktiqtaujukhanik.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Newline-avikhimayut regexes (kikliqangitut) ilaliutihimayut haffumunga atuqtauluaqtumun placeholder set, imaa {angleToken} haffumunga custom token syntax.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Newline-avikhimayut glob uuktuutingit aadjikutariyait parser-level keys-nut (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). Aadjikkiiktut kiluuttat piiqtauvaktut Numiktiriyip tukhiutaanit talvunggaulutik pivigiyait tammaqtailiplugit.

items.summaryDetails: Markdown naittuq ihuaqtuq PR timinganut havaamulluuniit naittumik.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} taima atauhirmik amigaitunikluuniit nuutaanik numiktiqhimayunik aulatitivakhimayut.

formats.title: Tutquumaviit Ihuaqhautait
formats.lede: Siksit utiffaaqtaaqtut ikayuutikkut atugahat. Hulidjutit taiguaqhugit attautit pidjutait-nayugait tutquumaviit, numiktiqhugit akiit, uvalu titiraqhugit nukaqhiit tugaaqhimayunun nayugainun.

resx.blurb: XML-pihimayut .NET ikayuutikkut tutquumaviit. Numiktirlugit iluanni titiraqhimajut tamainni {dataValue} node, tammaqtailiplugit uqaqtauhimajut naunaitkutikhallu.

xliff.blurb: OASIS XLIFF 2.0 titiqqat. Numiktirlugit tamaita {source} titiraqhugillu qanurinniit ihuaqtumut {target}, ihuaqhaqhugit {trgLang} nunamut.

po.blurb: GNU gettext Portable Object files. Numiktirlugit {msgid} / {msgidPlural} {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural} titiraqtakhat.

json.blurb: Arbitrary JSON tutquumaviit. Iliuraqhimayut hunavaluit akikliyuumiqtauyut {delimiter} kiklinganut numiktiriami, iliuraffaaqhugit piliurninngani. Dotted keys ({dottedKey}) tammaqtailiyauyut tainiit.

ini.blurb: Ayungnaitut {keyValue} tutquumaviit (Win32-style INI uvaluuniin quyaginaq flat config). Uiguani qulaani uqauhiuyulu ilipqamayauyut.

restext.blurb: Microsoft MUI text resources — flat {keyValue} malruuk atuqtaujut titirauhiit {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Utimut tingmidjutikhamut uqariiyautit
roundTrip.body: Uuktuutit katitiqhimayut naunaiyaiyut byte-for-byte-mun utiqtaqtut kivgaqtungnikkut iliuraidjutit tamainun ihuaqhaidjutinun. Ihuaqhaidjutikkut ihuangitumik ahiguqqat utiqtarnirmun naunaitkutingni, {issueLink} mikiyumik uuktuutimik.

recipes.title: Igadjutikhat
recipes.lede: Atuqtauluaqtut atugahat tuyungnikkut numiktiqhimayut: monorepos, tukihidjutit, ihuaqhaqhimayut qanuriniit, paniupayut, nipaitigut munaridjutit.

glossary.heading: Tukiliurutit qanurittunun atiinnik hunallu taidjutainnik
glossary.body: Tukiliurutingit tainiit iliuraqtauyut {after}, taimaa qaritauyakkut-numiktirhimayuq piliuqhimayuq pihimayait piumayarnik naunaitkutinik taimaa uuktuutinga himmiraluarumiuk aadjikutaanik.

customCategory.heading: Ihuaqhaqhimayut Numiktiriyiit qanuriniit (havagvikyuat / havagviit)
customCategory.body: Ayuqiqtuqlugu Azure {customTranslatorLink} katitiqvia corpus tapkua pidjutigiyaat havagvingni tainiit uvalu idjuhiit (maligatigut, munaqhiliqinikkut, niuvaanikkut, iluani-hananikkut, taimaalu.) uvalu tunilugu naunaitkutaa {categoryId}. Una hakugitqiyauyuq nipaa Azure tuniyaa.

tone.heading: Nipait munaridjutait + maliqattiarlugit
tone.body: Ilaliutilugu Custom Translator {categoryId} {profanityAction} unalu {allowFallbackFalse} pipkaidjutigiami aadjikutariiktumik nipinga nakuungittumiklu havaanga taimaa tikkuaqtauyuq ilagiyanga piqangitpat iliuraininnga atauhiqmut tikinnahuaqtarnut nunagiyarnut.

dryRun.heading: Paniupayumik aulapkaqlugu aulaqtinagu havauhiq
dryRun.body: Hulijakhaq tunihijuq naittumik titiraqhimajunik imaalu maliktakhat naittumik, kihimi titiraqhimajut titiraqhimajut. Ilaliutilugit {failOnErrorFalse} nuipkarlugit tamaita ajuqhautaujut qajagidjutikhamik uuktuffaaqtillutit.

faq.title: APIRHUUTAUQATAAQTUT
faq.lede: Qilamik kiudjutit apirhuutinun tapkua atuqtauluaqtut atuligaangamigit hulidjutit.

azure.heading: Qanuqtut hulijakhaq uqaqpakpa Azure-mut?
azure.body: Haffumuuna Microsoftkut {azureSdkLink} SDK, iliuraqhimayuq {corePipelineLink}. Taimaa uuktuffaarutiginiaqtat {statusCodes}, naqitautikkut apirhuutit kiudjutillu uuktuutit, tutqighaidjutillu qulaani munaridjutait akiitumik — tamaita tapkua algakkut {axios} hivayaqtut. Inungnut qanuriliurutingit qanga (iliuraqtauyut, piliurninnga, tutquumavingit piliurninnga) aadlangungittuq.

tone.heading: Huuq numiktitirutit ilaani ihuangitut?
tone.body: Qaritauyami numiktiriniq pilluaqtauyuq tamainnut piyuq uuktuutinga. Pingahut naqitautit ikayuutauyut: {glossaryLink} ayungnaqtunik tainiit ihuangitut, {customTranslatorLink} ihuaqhaqhimayut atugahat ayuiqhaqhimayut nipaitigut uvalu tainiitigut, uvalu {profanityAction} halumaqhinikkut uvaluuniin naunaitkutinik ihuangitumik taidjutinik.

duplicateFiles.heading: Qanuqtut numiktiqtailiniaqqigu aadjikutaa titiraq malruiqtuqlugu?
duplicateFiles.body: Aullaqtirlugu havauhikhaq {paths} aadjikkiiktut pivigiyarnut tutquumaviinaqnut, ukunatitut {sourceGlob}. Hulidjutit ilauyut inmi atauhirmun-trigger tutquumaviinun {githubToken} ihuaqhikpat, ikikliyuumiqhugit havaaghat tutquumaviinun kingulirmi commit.

offline.heading: Aulaqtittaaqqigu hulidjut qaritauyakkut?
offline.body: Taimaitpiangittuq — Azure AI Translator runtime qaritaq. Kihimi aulapkaqtaaqtat {dryRunTrue} naunaiyariami parsing unalu config pihimaittumik HTTP apirhuutinik numiktiriami.

node.heading: Kitumi Node-mi qanurinigani hulijutit aulava?
node.body: v3 aulayuq uvani GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} runtime. Atautimukhimayut JavaScript ihuaqtuq Node 20, 22, unalu 24, kitut CI uuktuqtait.

dist.heading: Humit katitiqhimayut {distDir} pihimayut?
dist.body: GitHub JS qanuriliurutingit tuyuqtait katitiqhimayut JS tutquumavinganut. Tamna {distBuild} havaanga piliuffaaqtaa atauttimungaraangat {mainBranch} ahinunngauniaqtuq, {distCheck} nutqaqtitait PRs utuqqanguqtut piliurninnga.

formats.heading: Qanuqtauq aalat ikayuutikkut atugahat?
formats.body: Ublumi: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} piumaguvit aallamik — tamna parser interface mikijuq (parse → nunaujaq → numiktitirinirmik →) imaalu ikajuutikhat tujuutaunginnariaqaqtut.

translations.title: Numiktigakhat
translations.lede: Una makpirnia numiktiqtauhimayuq Resource Translator inmikkut, tamainni naqitaraangat pilluagakhamut, tamainut uqauhirnut Azure AI Translator ikayuqtainut.

steps.workflow: Tatilugu tamna kahagaq itingmiktaa {workflowLink}, kitu {thisAction} inminik.
steps.fanOut: Hulidjutit tamainun Azure AI Translator-ikayuqtauyuq locale (ihuaqhaqtauhimayuq uvani {configPath}) uvalu titiraqhugit {messagesLocaleJson} attauhirmun turaaqtauyumun.
steps.pullRequest: Pull request angmaqtaujuq nutaanut numiktiqhimajunut. Atauttimungaqtirniq makpiraaliuffaarniaqtaa una makpirnia titiqqat iliuraqtaulutik.

translations.poweredBy: Powered by Resource Translator and Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Tunihimaaqtun
contributing.lede: Bug unniudjutit, feature requests, imaalu pull requests tamaita tunngahuktitaujut. Hulidjutit mikiyut ilaranaitut hivuliqmik ikayuqtunun.

steps.tests: Titiraqlugit utiffaagutikkut uuktuutit haffumunga parse → havauhiinun uvalu applyTranslations.

coverage.heading: Qulangnaiyautit kiklikhait
coverage.body: Tamna Jest config pipkaidjutiyuq mikitqiamik naunaipkainiq. Nutaaq naunaitkut pihimayakhait uqaqhimayut + nalruyut kiklikhaa qulaani 78 pusat uvalu aulalutik qulaani 90 pusat. Iliurailutit iliuraidjutikhanik uuktuutikhaniklu aallannguqtirutingnut.

docsSite.heading: Titiqiqidjutiliqiyunik qaritauyaliqidjutingni
docsSite.body: Tamna {docsDir} tutquumavia Astro 6 + Tailwind v4 havaakhaq. Aullaqtirlugu {npmInstall} atauhiinnarmik, ahiit {npmRunDev} nunangni ihivriuriami. Tamna {pagesWorkflow} workflow tujuutauvaktuq titiqqanik talvunga GitHub Pages tamainni atauttimungaqtirutini.

changelog.title: Aallannguqtirutit
changelog.lede: Anginiqhakkut naittut tuhaqtidjutit. Tamna canonical, atanniqtuidjutiqaqtuq aallannguqtirutinga ittuq CHANGELOG.md tutquumavingani.

releases.v302: {label} Numiktiriyi tukhiutait {apiVersion} alruyami tamangnun {translate} {languages}. Azure SDK nan'ngariyait ikayuqtauyumayunut api-version piyakhaq taimaa naunaitkutaq angiqtaukpat; Qanuriliurutinga naunaiqtitaa atauhiqmut apirhuutimut naunaitkutanganut, taimaa piyakhaq nipaittumik piiqtauyuq apirhuutingillu iliuraqtauyuq uumunnga Preview API-version talvani {translate} kaantrak qin'ngiyaa timiqutigiyaa HTTP 400 (Error Code {code}). Iniqtiqtaa ihuarhainiq aullaqtiqtuq 3.0.1-mi.
releases.v301: {label} Tamna {translate} tukhiut timia piqangittuq JSON array of {textItem} items imuhimaittumik {inputs} object, aadjikkutariyaa v3.0 REST kaantrak. Inmikkut una ihuaqhingitaa numiktirhimayut — takulugu 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: Nutaat iliuraqtauyut: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, unalu hivutunirmik Numiktiriyi naqitautait {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, unalu {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: Source locale tadja hivumuuqtitauyuq Numiktiriyimun {fromLocale} taimaali naittut naqitautit ilituriyaungitut.
items.resilience: {label} inmikkut uuktuffaarniq tadjakaffuk HTTP kiudjutit ({statusCodes}) nan'ngariplugu Azure's {retryAfter} header — utiffaaqpaktuq nutqangalimaiqhuni nutqarvikhaa talvaniingitpat. Ihuaqhaqlugit {maxRetries} unalu {retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} tokens ukunatut {mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} unalu HTML hunavaluit puuqhimayut sentinels-nut numiktiqtautinnagu utiqtitauplutiklu talvanga, taimaa Numiktiriyi nutqaqtitait i18next/Mustache/Handlebars/.NET/printf placeholders. Nuutlugu {protectPlaceholders}; uigulugu {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} nutaaq {noTranslatePatterns} iliuraidjutaa piiqtaa aadjikutaanik kiluutainnik Numiktiriyip tukhiutaanit tamaat (tammaqtailiplugit pivikhat akikhait atiinut, ihuittumik naunaitkutait, taimaalu.). Aadjikkiiktut glob idjuhiit parser-level keys-nut (JSON dotted path, RESX {resxName}, PO {poMsgid}, XLIFF unit {xliffId}, INI/restext key). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: Astro + Tailwind v4 docs qaritauyaliqivik tautuktuumiyaaqhugit nuutirutit uvalu Expressive Code.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Naunaitkutinga glyphs aadlanguqtut apqutimut taimaa nakuuhuiriami kalangit aadlatqiiktut gradient nutqarvinganut, tamna puktaqtuq {backToTop} naqitaut atuqtuq {inert} iiqhimagaluaqtillugu (talvalluamit {ariaHidden} naqitautinga naqittaaqtaraluanga), {formatsAstro} ilangit ayurhautiyungnaiqtut inmikkut-piliurhimayuq naunaitkutanganik naunaitkutingit, pingahuuyut  piannat naunaipkaiyuq BCP-47-nakuuyuq {lang} naunaitkutingit ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), aadjikutariyait {documentation} naunaitkutat naunaitkutat naunaiqtitauyut haniraani makpiraap ataanilu,  tamaitalu naunaipkutit naunaipkutit {inputs}/{configuration} tuyuutauhimayut qaritauyami taiguarutimik titiraqhimayumik.
items.inlineCode: {label} docs prose {codeElement} atuliqtuq uunavyaktumik/aupayaangayumik pidjutaa — aalangayuq qanurinia→accent atuqtauyuq atadjutinun uvalu taidjutainun.
items.automation: Dependabot auto-merge, CodeQL scanning, CI matrix.
